description_long: This is a single, medium-sized Sumo Citrus orange with a bright, textured orange peel and a distinctive topknot or knob at one end. The surface is dimpled and uneven, typical of citrus fruits, and the color is a vibrant orange with some subtle variations in hue. A round, purple and white sticker label is affixed to one side, displaying the Sumo Citrus branding and a product code. The fruit appears fresh and plump, with no visible blemishes or damage. The stem end is slightly protruding and greenish, while the opposite end is more rounded. The overall shape is slightly oblong, with the topknot making it easily recognizable as a Sumo Citrus orange.
description: A bright, dimpled Sumo Citrus orange with a topknot and a purple sticker label, featuring a vibrant orange peel and a plump, fresh appearance.
description_view_0: The orange is shown with its purple Sumo Citrus sticker label and the prominent topknot visible at the bottom left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded, dimpled surface of the orange with no visible sticker, showing a small indentation near the center.
description_view_2: The orange appears as a nearly perfect sphere with a uniform orange color and textured peel, with no sticker or topknot visible.
description_view_3: The topknot and a portion of the sticker label are visible, emphasizing the unique shape and branding of the fruit.
attribute_distinctive_markings_or_logos: Sumo Citrus sticker label with product code 3652
attribute_location_or_placement: grocery store produce section, fruit stand, kitchen countertop
